name: Yellowstone
description: Taylor Sheridan's modern Western TV universe — the Duttons, their Montana ranch, and prequels

questions.q: Who plays rancher patriarch John Dutton in Yellowstone?

source.notes: Won a Golden Globe for the role in 2023.

questions.q: In which U.S. state is Yellowstone set?

source.notes: The Dutton ranch borders Yellowstone National Park.

questions.q: In what year did Yellowstone premiere on the Paramount Network?

source.notes: Became cable's most-watched scripted series by Season 4.

questions.q: What is the Dutton family's primary business?

source.notes: The ranch is billed as the largest contiguous ranch in the U.S.

questions.q: Who co-created Yellowstone with John Linson?

source.notes: Sheridan also wrote Sicario and Hell or High Water.

questions.q: Which actress plays the whiskey-drinking, sharp-tongued Beth Dutton?

source.notes: British actress also known for Flight (2012).

questions.q: Who plays Beth's ranch-foreman love interest Rip Wheeler?

source.notes: Hauser and Costner previously worked together on Tin Cup (1996).

questions.q: Which former Navy SEAL son of John Dutton is played by Luke Grimes?

source.notes: Marries into the Broken Rock reservation via Monica.

questions.q: Which adopted son and attorney of John Dutton is played by Wes Bentley?

source.notes: Family lawyer and later Attorney General of Montana.

questions.q: Which country music star plays James Dutton in the 2021 prequel 1883?

source.notes: Appeared alongside real-life wife Faith Hill.

questions.q: Who plays Harrison Ford's on-screen wife Cara Dutton in the 2022 prequel 1923?

source.notes: First time Ford and Mirren co-starred in a leading project.

questions.q: Which real Montana ranch serves as the filming location for the Dutton homestead?

source.notes: Located in Darby, Montana; previously the 'Ford-Hollister Ranch'.

questions.q: Which country music veteran and actor plays wagon-train leader Shea Brennan in 1883?

source.notes: Won the SAG Award for his performance in 1883.

questions.q: Which prequel is set in the early 20th century with Harrison Ford and Helen Mirren leading the cast?

source.notes: Premiered December 2022 on Paramount+.

questions.q: Who composed the Yellowstone score?

source.notes: Also scored Iron Man 3 and the Fast & Furious sequels.

questions.q: Which actress plays Monica, Kayce Dutton's wife and a member of the Broken Rock Reservation?

source.notes: Also appeared in Teen Wolf (MTV).

questions.q: Which Oscar-winner is set to lead the sequel series The Madison?

source.notes: The project evolved out of an earlier planned Texas-set spin-off.

questions.q: Which Indigenous reservation neighbors the Dutton ranch in the show?

source.notes: Fictional; home of Chairman Thomas Rainwater.

questions.q: Who plays a young John Dutton in flashbacks throughout the series?

source.notes: Best known for Sweet Home Alabama (2002) and A Beautiful Mind (2001).

questions.q: In which Montana city did Yellowstone production relocate its base starting in 2020?

source.notes: Earlier seasons were split between Utah and Montana.

questions.q: Which Yellowstone prequel features Faith Hill alongside Tim McGraw as the founding Dutton couple?

source.notes: Paramount+ limited series following the Dutton family's westward trek.

questions.q: Which planned Yellowstone prequel will focus on the Duttons during World War II?

source.original_a: The Dutton family during World War II
source.notes: Announced by Paramount+ as part of Taylor Sheridan's expanding universe.
